---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case? Please
describe how you currently work around the missing feature, if you do.

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine this working? UI mockups, code sketches, or rough
wire-format ideas all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this. Knowing what you've ruled
out helps us avoid suggesting them again.

## Scope

- [ ] This belongs in `simpit_common` (shared protocol/security/platform)
- [ ] This belongs in `simpit_slave`
- [ ] This belongs in `simpit_control` core
- [ ] This is a UI/UX change in `simpit_control.ui`
- [ ] I'm not sure

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this with guidance
- [ ] Yes, I have a draft
- [ ] No, just suggesting
